description: Player keyboard input for one or more game ticks, written to the player's PDS.

main.description: Record containing player input for a batch of game ticks.

session.description: The game session this input belongs to.

seq.description: Sequence number of the first tick in this batch. Monotonically increasing per session.

keys.description: Array of key bitmasks, one per tick. Allows batching multiple ticks in one record.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this input was originally created.
